name: samil-pwc-internal-control-plugin
description: A Codex plugin that helps internal-control reviewers triage sample evidence packages, detect missing proof, compare key fields, and draft follow-up questions without issuing final audit conclusions.

interface.shortDescription: Flags missing evidence and contract-voucher-approval mismatches before internal-control workpaper review.
interface.longDescription: Review-support workflow for internal audit and internal accounting management testing. The plugin helps a reviewer structure a transaction sample package, check whether expected evidence is present, compare contract, approval, invoice, voucher, and payment fields, flag missing or inconsistent records, and produce follow-up questions for a human reviewer. It does not decide whether a control is effective, deficient, or audit-reportable.
capabilities: Missing contract, approval, invoice, and voucher detection
Amount, counterparty, date, and approval-status comparison
Risk flag output with source field evidence
defaultPrompt: Review this internal-control sample package for missing evidence.
Compare contract, approval, invoice, and voucher fields.
Draft follow-up questions for unresolved evidence gaps.
